name_en: Model: 666713. 💕MCM💕 Visetos Cylindrical Crossbody Bag. The geometric shape of this small crossbody bag is more exquisite against the backdrop of the classic Visetos pattern 🌹 and the gold-plated logo tag. The bag is made of 🇫🇷 French Nappa 🐂 leather and features a double-sided zipper closure. The fabric lining provides ample internal space to store your valuables. This cylindrical crossbody bag can be carried via the top leather handle or the included crossbody strap for increased portability. Strap length is 98 to 114. Dimensions: 16x16x14.
